channel.title: AltaMedicare — Medicare News & Updates
channel.description: Important Medicare changes, savings opportunities, and Utah-specific Medicare news from AltaMedicare.

item.title: Medicare Will Cover Weight-Loss GLP-1 Drugs for $50/Month Starting July 2026
item.description: A new Medicare demonstration — the GLP-1 Bridge — lets eligible Part D members get Wegovy and Zepbound for weight loss at $50 a month, from July 1, 2026 through December 31, 2027.

item.title: Are You Missing Out on Extra Help?
item.description: Many Utah seniors qualify for Extra Help with prescription costs and don't know it. Checking your eligibility could save thousands.

item.title: Scam Alert: Calls Asking for Your Medicare Number
item.description: If someone pressures you to share your Medicare number or sign up immediately, it's a scam. Here's how to protect yourself.

item.title: Insulin Stays Capped at $35 a Month
item.description: Covered insulin remains capped at $35 per month for Medicare beneficiaries in 2026.

item.title: 2026 Part D $2,000 Out-of-Pocket Cap Now in Effect
item.description: Medicare prescription costs are now capped at $2,000 a year — real savings for anyone on multiple medications.

item.title: Medicare Advantage Plan Changes for 2026
item.description: Networks, formularies, and benefits all shift each year. Here's what changed for Utah plans — and how it affects you.
